---
filters:
  - ../container-writer.lua

format:
  html:
    css: styles/poem.css
  epub:
    css: styles/poem.css
  pdf:
    include-in-header: styles/poem.tex
    output-file: poem-latex.pdf
  
  # quarto render --to context broken: uses LaTeX template instead of ConTeXt
  # see https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/issues/14209
  context:
    include-in-header: styles/poem.ctx
    output-file: poem-context.pdf
  typst:
    include-in-header: styles/poem.typ
    output-file: poem-typst.pdf
    
project:
  output-dir: output/quarto
---
{{< include poem.md >}}
